task_objective: Add size guard for n_unique and other value_counts metrics
design_decisions: Introduced n_unique_threshold (default 1,000,000) to skip expensive singleton counts and frequency tables on large, high-cardinality datasets. Optimized n_unique by using literal values for confirmed unique columns. Refactored ProfileReport to include a finalize() method, ensuring derived metrics like p_unique are calculated correctly after all metrics are gathered. Standardized per-column total counts (n) in global aggregation for reliable thresholding.
results: Benchmarks on 20M and 50M rows confirmed ~30% reduction in total profiling time when heavy metrics are skipped for high-cardinality columns. All 141 tests passed.
